key_positions: Strongly support the goals of the Paris Agreement to limit global warming.
Invest heavily in renewable energy sources like solar and wind through federal incentives.
Promote the development and adoption of electric vehicles.
Focus on technological innovation and carbon capture to achieve net-zero by 2050.
Implement methane reduction regulations for oil and gas operations.
red_lines: Will not agree to binding emissions cuts without commitments from all major economies.
Opposes unilateral carbon tariffs that could harm international trade relationships.
Protects domestic energy security while transitioning to clean energy.
